Meloni set cheer on Team Italy at Olympics

Trending

ROME,
                          24 July 2024, 16:16

ANSA English Desk

Share

- ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

Premier Giorgia Meloni is set to
visit to the Paris Olympics to cheer on Team Italy, ANSA sources
said on Wednesday.The premier is thinking to paying a trip to the Olympics after
her visit to China at the end of the month, the sources said.President Sergio Mattarella is set to fly to Paris on Thursday
and meet Italian athletes at the Olympic village.On Friday he will inaugurate Italy's Casa Italia base in Paris
before attending Games opening ceremony.
